subject: [RFC PATCH 04/40] mm: mm_init: fix zone assignment for pages in unavailable ranges

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the Linux kernel's memory initialization code where pages in unavailable ranges are assigned to the wrong zone. The problem occurs when an unavailable range spans multiple zones, causing later page_zone() calls to return incorrect results. To fix this, the patch looks up the correct zone for each PFN in the hole during initialization, which has no performance impact since it only runs once at boot time.
